response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the experience bar with roughly 15 years of fullstack work, including current hands-on TypeScript/Node.js product development and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators and agentic tooling) at Naver, plus React, AWS, MongoDB, and Kubernetes exposure across recent roles. His testing craftsmanship background (TDD, trunk-based development, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses) aligns well with the role's quality expectations. Gaps are stack-specific rather than fundamental: no explicit Nest.js or Kotlin experience, Java is dated, and a notable share of his portfolio is in off-stack technologies (DLang, Ember.js), so React depth should be probed in interview.
strengths: 15+ years of fullstack experience with recent TypeScript/Node.js/React work at scale
Direct AI-agent development experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow tooling) — an explicitly required and rare skill
Strong testing and craftsmanship culture: TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, taught testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, the primary backend framework for the role
No Kotlin and only dated Java exposure for the secondary backend stack
Significant portion of recent depth is in off-stack tech (DLang, Ember.js), leaving React/Vitest depth unverified

key_factors.factor: Long tenure in TypeScript/Node fullstack roles
Missing Nest.js and Kotlin from primary/secondary stack
